failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    p.full_name
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'Florianópolis | Florianopolis')
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
